desc: AE Dupondius. TI CLAVDIVS CAESAR AVG P M TR P IMP, head left / CERES AVGVSTA, Ceres, veiled and draped, seated left on ornamental throne, holding two corn-ears and long torch, S C
AE Dupondius. TI CLAVDIVS CAESAR AVG P M TR P IMP P P, bare head left / CERES AVGVSTA S C, Ceres seated left, holding corn ears and sceptre. BMCRE 197; Cohen 1. Text
